calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Ccp 583.250(A) For Failure To Serve Summons Within Three Years Of Commencement Of The Action; Motion To Quash Service And Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-19-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ROBERT F. COHEN, Tel No. (310) 858-9771 specially appearing for Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.;
Atty. AMY S. ANDERSON of Aroplex Law, Tel No. (415) 866-4066 appearing telephonically for Defendant Robert Corsi.

Matter argued by counsel. The Court takes under submission Defendant Robert Corsi's Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To CCP 583.250(A) For Failure To Serve Summons Within Three Years Of Commencement Of The Action; Motion To Quash Service And Vacate Default Judgment. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Ccp 583.250(A) For Failure To Serve Summons Within Three Years Of Commencement Of The Action; Motion To Quash Service And Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-16-2015 Continued To Feb-05-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROBERT CORSI'S Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To CCP 583.250(A) For Failure To Serve Summons Within Three Years Of Commencement Of The Action; Motion To Quash Service And Vacate Default Judgment is continued on the Court's motion to February 5, 2015. Judge: A. James Robertson, II, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/AJR)
